briefing:
# ORACLE INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING
**2026-05-28 04:14 UTC | Pre-Open, T-65hrs to Sunday Open**

---

**1. SYSTEM STATE**
Running v015. Forex Sharpe 2.097. ICT win rate 42.3% with weekly trend gate engaged. Library threat 0.05 (LATE_CYCLE_MOMENTUM pattern, low concern). Bridge mode NORMAL. OANDA practice account connected, NAV $110,000. G1 GREEN 99.7%, G2a PASS 36.4%, G2b at 1/8 sample, G4 GREEN.

**2. WHAT CHANGED TODAY**
We shipped the defensive layer the system has been missing: DailyReadiness, PropRiskManager (6 gates), DecisionChain, and ExecutionTracker now sit in series between signal and fill. The weekly trend gate alone lifted WR from 39.6% to 42.3% by killing counter-trend trades, and Oracle moved to Opus 4.8 for nightly reflection with Haiku micro-corrections every 2 hours. Tiingo replaced yfinance as primary forex feed; 10/11 APIs live.

**3. THE FVG FINDING**
FVG appeared in 160/160 validated indicator combinations with a 71% standalone hit rate on holdout, confirmed across four independent years. This is the structural edge — every trade firing Monday morning is FVG-anchored, which is why I have conviction in the express scanner queue.

**4. RISK POSTURE**
Capital is well-defended. No trade reaches OANDA without clearing: DailyReadiness (portfolio assessment) → DecisionChain (5 questions in series) → PropRiskManager (6 gates) → ExecutionTracker (slippage logged to fills.jsonl). The weekly trend gate filters at signal stage; correlation blocking is live (already killed GBPUSD LONG today to avoid stacking with EURUSD SHORT). This is roughly four independent veto points per trade.

**5. TOMORROW (Sunday 21:00 UTC)**
At open, two queued FVG express signals fire: **EURUSD SHORT** and **USDJPY LONG**. GBPUSD LONG stays blocked by correlation gate. London scanner activates 03:00
